title: Director's Pick: For Traders Unveils the BOGO + 20% Epic!
description: The cinematic universe of prop trading is alive with a new feature! For Traders rolls out an unprecedented BOGO + 20% OFF deal, giving aspiring traders the chance to double their journey to success.
seo_content:
For Traders BOGO + 20% OFF Deal

For Traders has launched an unprecedented Buy One Get One (BOGO) deal paired with an additional 20% OFF using code BOGO100K. This combination means when you purchase a 100K challenge, you receive a second account of equal size absolutely free, and your entire order is further reduced by 20%. This stacking of a BOGO offer with a percentage discount is exceptionally rare in the prop trading industry and delivers enormous value per dollar spent.

For Traders is a Dubai-based proprietary trading firm that has distinguished itself through aggressive promotions, a trader-welfare-focused feature set including Lockout Mode, and multi-platform support. The firm operates out of the UAE, one of the world's fastest-growing financial hubs, and has established a strong following among traders who value both innovation and institutional reliability.

With code BOGO100K, you get double the capital exposure at a significantly reduced cost. Two 100K accounts at a 20% discount effectively means you are trading $200,000 in simulated capital for less than the standard price of a single 100K challenge. Both accounts benefit from For Traders' full feature set, including Lockout Mode, multi-platform access, and the firm's standard competitive profit split.

For Traders' trading conditions support a broad range of strategies across multiple platforms. The 100K challenge tier features clearly defined profit targets and drawdown limits, with no unnecessary time pressure. The Lockout Mode feature is particularly valuable across both accounts as it enforces your daily loss limits automatically, protecting both evaluations from a single bad session.

To claim this BOGO deal, visit For Traders via the affiliate link above, navigate to the 100K challenge, and enter code BOGO100K at checkout. Both accounts will be activated simultaneously, and the 20% discount will be applied to the total before checkout. This offer is valid through December 31, 2026, but promotional capacity may be limited — purchase as soon as you are ready to begin your challenge.
